entries.description: Enables async execution for supported operations.
entries.example: Set false when testing unexplained compatibility or threading issues.

entries.description: Documented as the snow piller tick interval.
notes: Current source review found no active call sites for this entry.
Treat it as potentially non-functional until confirmed.

entries.description: Controls the configured snow replacer interval used by the main snow feature bootstrap.
Enables snowstorm mode that increases snow piling intensity.
entries.example: Set true to use storm mode in supported snow flows.

entries.description: Maximum total snow layers allowed per column.
notes: 0 allows effectively no additional cap beyond the underlying game rule usage in the current source.

entries.description: Enables extra grass and flower growth during warm seasons.
entries.example: Set false to disable this growth feature.

entries.description: Maps Serene Seasons to real-world Canadian months using the America/Toronto timezone.
entries.example: Set true to keep the season aligned with the calendar.
notes: Current Fabric source review shows this key is defined but not loaded or saved.

entries.description: Enables season-based Better Days speed changes.
entries.example: Set false when you want custom values instead of seasonal values.

entries.description: Allows custom day and night values when seasonal daylight is disabled.
entries.example: Set true after disabling seasonal daylight.
notes: If seasonal daylight stays enabled, this does not take priority.

entries.description: Custom Better Days day speed value used when custom cycle mode is active.
notes: The config comment mentions ticks, but the implementation passes this as a Better Days speed value.

entries.description: Custom Better Days night speed value used when custom cycle mode is active.
notes: The config comment mentions ticks, but the implementation passes this as a Better Days speed value.
Forge stores settings in categorized common config entries.
Fabric stores settings in config/sereneseasonsplus.json with flat keys.
